case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. ALAN ALEXIS TORREZ GARCIA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, ALAN ALEXIS TORREZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-23-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
